headlines.text: Iran skips Islamabad talks after US Navy seizes Iranian cargo ship, ceasefire expires Wednesday
7.4 magnitude earthquake hits off Japan's northeastern coast, tsunami warning issued then downgraded
JD Vance expected to depart for Pakistan Tuesday for second round of US-Iran nuclear talks
Trump says ceasefire is over Wednesday, warns it is 'highly unlikely' he extends it without a deal
Stock futures fall as Iran tensions flare and Strait of Hormuz remains essentially closed
Gas prices remain above $4/gallon nationally; Energy Secretary says sub-$3 may not return until 2027
RFK Jr. finishes marathon week of congressional hearings on vaccines, measles, and HHS budget cuts
Tariff refunds begin rolling out today as importers apply for $166 billion in Supreme Court-ordered relief
Michael Jackson biopic starring nephew Jaafar Jackson opens in US theaters this Friday, April 24
Man kills 8 children across 3 homes in Shreveport, Louisiana in nation's deadliest mass shooting since 2024

breaking.text: Iran says it has NO plans for new talks after US Navy seizes cargo ship TOUSKA; ceasefire expires Wednesday

stories.hed: Iran Cancels Talks After US Navy Shoots Hole in Their Ship (Literally)
stories.dek: The US guided-missile destroyer USS Spruance fired on the Iranian cargo ship TOUSKA in the Gulf of Oman, then US Marines took custody of the vessel. Iran responded by canceling peace talks and calling it a war crime, which is the diplomatic equivalent of storming out of dinner before dessert. Ceasefire expires Wednesday; Vance is reportedly packing his bags for Islamabad anyway.

stories.hed: 7.4 Earthquake Strikes Off Japan, Tsunami Warning Issued and Downgraded
stories.dek: A powerful 7.4-magnitude quake hit off Japan's northeastern coast Monday, prompting a three-meter tsunami warning for Iwate, Hokkaido, and Aomori prefectures that was later downgraded to an advisory. No injuries were immediately confirmed, though 200 power outages were reported and PM Sanae Takaichi urged coastal residents to evacuate to higher ground.

stories.hed: Supreme Court Tariff Refunds Begin Today: $166 Billion Up for Grabs
stories.dek: Two months after the Supreme Court struck down Trump's sweeping tariffs, the refund application process officially opens today for American importers owed over $166 billion. It's the largest tariff refund program in US history, which is a sentence that probably sounded impossible four years ago.

stories.hed: RFK Jr. Wraps Congressional Gauntlet: Seven Hearings, Zero Vaccine Endorsements
stories.dek: Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. completed a sprint of congressional budget hearings this week, where Democrats grilled him on measles outbreaks, gutted vaccine recommendations, and proposed $16 billion in HHS cuts. He conceded the MMR vaccine is 'safe for most people,' which his own agency has been quietly undermining, a distinction that was not lost on anyone in the room.

stories.hed: Pope Leo XIV vs. Trump: The Holy See vs. The Truth Social
stories.dek: Pope Leo XIV pushed back Monday on Trump's criticism of his calls for peace in the Iran war, saying his message is rooted in the Gospel rather than weakness. Trump had accused the Pope of being 'too liberal and weak on crime' on social media, making this the most unusual papal beef since at least the Reformation. Supporters at Trump rallies in Las Vegas and Phoenix sided with Trump in the dispute, which is a sentence historians will enjoy.

markets.context: Futures slid sharply on renewed Iran-US tensions after the USS Spruance seized an Iranian cargo ship and peace talks collapsed, sending oil surging and equities lower.

gas.note: Gas is so expensive even your car is reconsidering its life choices.

popCulture.hed: Michael Jackson Biopic Opens Friday: Nephew Jaafar Jackson Stars in Most Anticipated Biopic in Years
popCulture.dek: The long-delayed Michael biopic, directed by Antoine Fuqua and starring MJ's actual nephew Jaafar Jackson, finally hits US theaters this Friday April 24 in IMAX. The $155M film covers Jackson's rise from the Jackson 5 to global superstardom, though critics note it conspicuously moonwalks around his legal controversies.

genZ.term: Rick and Morty Dance / I Was Looking For a Job
genZ.definition: An AI-generated cartoon dance battle video by TikToker @reqdeca went viral in late March, blowing up further in April when set to a Yeat-style remix of The Smiths song featuring the 'I was looking for a job and then I found a job' lyric. Millions of TikTokers are now recreating the dance and overlaying it with every possible brainrot caption format.
genZ.usage: POV: Iran cancels peace talks the same week your ceasefire expires [Rick and Morty doing the dance]
genZ.source: Know Your Meme via Yahoo News

tldr: The US-Iran ceasefire is on life support after American Marines seized an Iranian cargo ship and Tehran canceled peace talks, with the clock ticking to Wednesday's expiration. Meanwhile Japan got hit by a 7.4 earthquake, gas remains painful at $4.16 a gallon, and somehow a Michael Jackson biopic opening Friday is the most normal thing happening this week.
